name: ILM/Pools of Storage Tool Decision Components and IP Framework
description: An internal Aberdeen Group strategy presentation outlining the business premises and IP framework for the ILM/Pools of Storage (PoS) Hardware Hawker (HH) sales tool developed for Maxtor. The document establishes that the HH tool is Aberdeen IP with Maxtor receiving limited usage rights; proposes a broader commercialization strategy through a Storage COE involving HP, EMC, IBM, Intel, Sun, and others; and presents a permitted usage matrix defining where Aberdeen deliverables (white papers and ILM tools) may be deployed. A critical IP dispute between Aberdeen and Maxtor over tool rights is documented.
